mapper.select: SELECT pay.pay_no, pay.create_time, pay.`status`, pay.pay_type, item.charge_ltem_id, item.amount, item.charge_ltem_name, pay.pay_id FROM driving_pay AS pay LEFT JOIN driving_charge_ltem AS item ON item.charge_ltem_id = pay.charge_ltem_id WHERE pay.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT pay.pay_no, pay.create_time, pay.`status`, pay.pay_type, item.charge_ltem_id, item.amount, item.charge_ltem_name, pay.pay_id, pay.detailed_explanation FROM driving_pay AS pay LEFT JOIN driving_charge_ltem AS item ON item.charge_ltem_id = pay.charge_ltem_id WHERE pay.pay_id = #{payId}
